---
title: 'Impact Circles'
date: '2013-01-15T04:52:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8860526960107557390'
blogger_filename: '/2013/01/impact-circles.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Digesting'
---

<h2 style="text-align: center;">
Impact Circles:</h2>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://1.bp.blogspot.com/-ZwCvkSdvzfA/UPSgn2jLm2I/AAAAAAAAKQQ/PQsSyGEzfhQ/s1600/Impact+Circles.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" height="300" src="http://1.bp.blogspot.com/-ZwCvkSdvzfA/UPSgn2jLm2I/AAAAAAAAKQQ/PQsSyGEzfhQ/s400/Impact+Circles.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
The one area I have the MOST impact over is myself. After that I can impact my imediate and extended family. I can impact my church. Through joint efforts with others I can impact a city, a nation, a world. One person affects other people who affect others until that affect ripples out to create affects that go far beyond our immediate circle.<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-AdxCxemf4RU/UPSjABghpRI/AAAAAAAAKQg/29dSXweT4vc/s1600/Ripple+Effect.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-AdxCxemf4RU/UPSjABghpRI/AAAAAAAAKQg/29dSXweT4vc/s1600/Ripple+Effect.jpg" /></a></div>
So what can one person choosing a life of excellence really do to impact the world around him? What can one church creating an atmosphere of excellence do to impact the city? What can one city (churches working together) do to impact a region or state? What can one state do to impact a nation? What can one nation do to impact the world?<br />
<br />
Likewise; if I see a hurting City, Nation, World, Etc... If I see a society throwing off it's rightousness and heading for destruction willfully, but it's roots were of God in the begginning... how do I, one man, call it back? If I want to live as a witness of God's work in the earth, can I even do it at work? What's the solution to it all?<br />
<br />
Excellence must be won by and in the hearts of the people, before it will ever affect the World at large. Before Peter could become a World Overcomer, he must be taught that:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>Grace</b>: Is the only power to change.</li>
<ul>
<li>It's OK for me not to be perfect, because HE is!</li>
<li>(Restored Three Times as he Rejected Three Times)</li>
</ul>
<li><b>Love</b>: Is the power to make feeding God's sheep your number one priority.&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>Once I'm free of concern for ME I can begin to love on others and be concerned about their welfare!</li>
<li>(Feed Me Sheep)</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
We are witnessess of and for Jesus Christ.&nbsp;<a href="http://bible.cc/acts/1-8.htm" target="_blank">http://bible.cc/acts/1-8.htm</a>. Whether we like it or not. People watch us. I've never before heard so many people openly talk about how they hate church or Christians as they do now in this day and this hour. But why? Is it their fault? No! It's ours! We've failed to show them what real Christians are. Where are the healings taking place in the markets? Why are so many Christians just as likely to push you aside for that next promotion? Where is the real Christianity? Excellence. We are being called to live at a higher level. Why do some people seem to succeed in their walk with God and most don't? Are they special?&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Is Kenneth Copeland special in his ability to get things done Debt Free? No. He made a high quality decision to live a certain lifestyle, a lifestyle that could be summed up by one word: <b>EXCELLENCE</b>. He simply takes the highest ground when choices come up. Notice, not the higher ground, the HIGHEST ground. If there are only choice A or B before him... he stops and prays and God shows him a plan Z3F around the corner... He is willing to make the tought choices, make sacrifices, do without for a time, in order to do it the right way. As a result, after 40 years of living this way, he is living like no one else. Never limit God!</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
David Ramsey says: "<b>Live like no one else, so that you can LIVE like no one else!</b>" In other words, do without today, if you must, in order to have and enjoy your wealth tomorrow. Maybe you drive an older car today while you friend makes payments on his new car. But tomorrow you'll be driving your new debt free car and he'll still be making payments on his. Live like no one else, so that you can LIVE like no one else!</div>
<div>
______________________</div>
<h4 style="text-align: left;">
What areas of my life do I have a direct impact over?</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Myself</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>My Actions</b></li>
<li><b>My&nbsp;Attitudes</b></li>
</ul>
<li><b>My Family/Home</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>My Actions</b></li>
<li><b>My&nbsp;Attitudes</b></li>
</ul>
<li><b>My Work</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>My Actions</b></li>
<li><b>My&nbsp;Attitudes</b></li>
</ul>
<li><b>My Church</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>My Actions</b></li>
<li><b>My Attitudes</b></li>
</ul>
<li><b>My Sphere of Influence</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>Those I interact with every day...&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>At the store, during other activities, etc</b></li>
<ul>
<li><b>My Actions</b></li>
<li><b>My Attitudes</b></li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<h4>
What does Excellence NOT mean?</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Perfection</b>. Excellence does not mean I do everything right all the time and I never make mistakes or have bad days or choose the wrong path sometimes.&nbsp;</li>
<li><b>JUST </b>anything. It's just about work, or home or prayer, or any one thing. It's about all of them. It's about how I impact the world around me.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<h4>
What does Excellence mean?</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Me </b>doing what I can to live a life pleasing to God. Making better choices.</li>
<li><b>Attitude and Actions</b></li>
<li><b>Do what's right, because it's right; do it right; and do it right away.</b></li>
<ul>
<li>It's really one thing, not many. If I'm dedicated to doing things the right way, not just a good way, but THE right way, in ever circumstance, than I am living a life of excellence.</li>
<li>Jesus said "I only do what I see my Father do. I only say what I hear my Father say..." How did he do that? Through time with The Father.&nbsp;</li>
<li>The Enemy of GREAT is GOOD.&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>In <a href="http://www.amazon.com/Good-Great-Companies-Leap-Others/dp/0066620996/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1358223960&amp;sr=8-1&amp;keywords=jim+collins+-+good+to+great" target="_blank">Good to Great, by Jim Collins</a>&nbsp;the idea is put forth that the enemy of "great" is "good".&nbsp;</li>
<li>Being good enough, working good enough, "it's working fine why mess with it..." are the phrases of a mediocre mind living a mediocre life.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<li>Good enough isn't.</li>
<li>God has only done great things in the lifes of people who were willing to give all of themselves to Him.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
It can't be a one day a week deal. It can't be a 10 minutes in the morning and never think about it again deal. If we are to allow this life to permeate every thought and activity we have/do, we must allow God room to do so. What if I began to take notice, throughout the day, of thoughts, attitudes, activities, mindsets, words, or actions that were not the BEST for that moment in time, then in midstream, I changed them. Repent (change the mind) right there, and do the RIGHT thing. What kind of impact would that have on the world around me and the world around the world around me?<br />
<br />
There is coming a generation of people who decide to live this way. There will be not one or two like in the days of John G Lake or Smith Wigglesworth. There will be MANY. This nation will not be taken by politics but by prayer. Most specifically to an awakening to who we are In Him. As we awake to who we are, we will awake to actions that reflect that awareness.<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="http://www.emic.org/blog/?p=274" target="_blank">June 29, 2008</a>, the Lord spoke through Billye Brim during a Sunday afternoon Prayer Mountain corporate prayer time regarding the 2012 election. He said, “<b>One thing will save America, and it is NOT the election. It is an awakening to God! One thing will avail for Israel and the nations, an awakening to God!”
</b></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
“This ‘<a href="http://www.billyebrim.org/content/prophecy_given_kenneth_copeland_july_4_2009_read_bvov_11909" target="_blank">Great Awakening</a>’ that is hanging heavy over the United States even tonight. This ‘Great Awakening’ that’s hanging heavy around the nations of the world but most especially in this country and in Canada. ...<br />“<b>The praying churches will walk in it first</b>. And they’ll say, “My, revival broke out over there.’ <b>No, answered prayer broke out over there</b>.’ The ‘Awakening’ will come out of congregations. There is a hunger in this nation for holiness.
</blockquote>
Awakenings don't start with the World. Awakenings don't start in churches. Awakenings don't start in groups of any kind. Awakenings start in hearts. One heart decides to awake to God and finds it's been acting as though it were asleep to God and His ways. Other hearts do the same. Those hearts begin to attract toward one another as they form something larger. That begins to awaken others, and it grows until it takes a nation. It's happened in mass at least three or four other times to this nation. The USA has all but lost it's Grace only to awaken in mass to it again. That awakening is now upon us. But it will start with individuals making a choice to awaken to the things of God.<br />
<br />
I would have said I was awake to them. Indeed I know and beleive more now that I did 10 years ago. I know more than most of the people I left behind still struggling with questions I now find basic. But do I WALK in what I know? Not nearly as much. Walking the walk is now the task at hand. Walking the walk is the call I'm hearing. Walking the Walk of Excellence in all I say, think, and do. Only then can I unite with others to see things change in my life and then in the world around me.<br />
<h4>
Conclusion:</h4>
<b>Passion: The educated, life changing, decision that something is worth everything.&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
Passion is not an emotion. A passionate life is not one filled with an over abundance of emotional high's. It is one that is filled with a myriad of small decisions that create larger decisions that create a life.<br />
<br />
<b>Passion for Excellence then is: The educated, life changing, decision that excellence is worth everything. That I will dedicate myself to doing what's right, because it's right, do it right, and do it right away.&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
<br />
DW
